description_long: This object is a round, purple rice cooker with a glossy enamel finish, featuring a matching lid that fits snugly on top. The lid has a central, circular knob in a contrasting light color, likely made of heat-resistant material for safe handling. Two large, integrated side handles are present, symmetrically placed for easy lifting and carrying. The body is smooth and seamless, with a slightly flared rim and a deep, capacious interior suitable for cooking rice or stews. There are no visible buttons, control panels, or power cords, suggesting a simple, possibly stovetop design. The overall appearance is modern and functional, with a focus on durability and ease of use.
description: A glossy purple rice cooker with a matching lid, central knob, and two large side handles. The design is smooth, modern, and functional, with no visible controls or power cord.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large side handles and the central lid knob clearly.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the right handle and the curvature of the body, with the lid knob visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing both handles and the lid knob from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Angled view focusing on the left handle and the body’s rounded shape, with the lid knob visible.
attribute_lid_design: The lid is round, slightly domed, made of the same enameled metal as the body, and is fully removable. It features a central, circular, light-colored knob for lifting, with no visible vents, windows, or locks.
attribute_handle_type: Two large, fixed, integrated side handles made of enameled metal, matching the body color, positioned symmetrically for balanced lifting.
